data.name: Division 36 Truck Inspection form-Walmart
data.description: Truck Inspection Form for Wes's Group

entries.label: Trash & Debris Removed fom Truck Bed?
Fluid Levels (oil, windshield, coolant, brake, transmission) Adequate?
Are Lug Nuts Tight? (check @ 50-70 miles after last off)
Last Tire Change or Next Rotation
Any Cracks, Stars, or Spiders in Lights or Windshield?
Exterior Mirrors Operate & in Good Condition?
Visible Signs of Fluid Leaks? (e.g., Oil Staining)?
Fire Extinguisher Behind Passenger Seat Sign Present?
First Aid Kit Behind Passenger Seat Sign Present?
Lock Up Your Tools Sign Present?
Apex Sign/Logo Present on Both Doors/Sides?
Any other Concern on Exterior Condition?
Coupling Device & Hitch - Any Cracks / Broken Welds?
Are Lug Nuts Tight (Check Upon Each Hook Up)
Fire Extinguisher Present Behind the Seat?
First Aid Kit Present Behind Passenger Seat?
First Aid Kit Contentsin Adequate Condition/Quantity?
Dedicated Fuel Card Present in Glove Box?
What To Do In Case of Accident envelop in Glove Box?
The Following Functions Appear to Work as Designed:
Rear View Camera & Back-Up Sensors (if present)
Any other Concern on Interior Condition?
